text: Implemented multiplicity-safe block Krylov with deterministic width-k starts, full reorthogonalization, soft locking, thick-restart growth, invariant-complement replenishment, matrix-free cached operator images, and dense Rayleigh-Ritz projections. Added analytic repeated-root, C4, disconnected-nullspace, permutation/projector, both-ends, smallest-magnitude, partial-convergence, and n=120 subspace tests plus JMH baseline and contract docs. Verification: coreJVM 435/435, coreJS 432/432, focused 18/18 on both platforms, benchmark compile green.
